hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$CMD" in *"git commit"*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 0; out=$(npm run typecheck 2>&1) || { echo "Commit blocked: typecheck failed:" >&2; echo "$out" | tail -30 >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
